# Issue Risk Types
*Reference list of risk types that can be associated with Wiz Issues, including severity levels and risk categories.*

Category: reference

This page lists the Wiz-defined types of risks for Issues.

To use the `risk` property for filtering, insert the risk ID. Do not use the risk name. For example, use `"wct-id-1861"`, and not `"C2 & Exfiltration"`.

| Risk Name                   | Risk ID       |
| :-------------------------- | :------------ |
| Application Weakness        | `wct-id-3478` |
| C2 & Exfiltration           | `wct-id-1861` |
| Credential Access           | `wct-id-1860` |
| Defense Evasion             | `wct-id-1859` |
| Discovery                   | `wct-id-1855` |
| Execution                   | `wct-id-1856` |
| External Attack Surface     | `wct-id-3032` |
| External Exposure           | `wct-id-5`    |
| High-Profile Threat         | `wct-id-907`  |
| Impact                      | `wct-id-1862` |
| Insecure Application        | `wct-id-2`    |
| Insecure CI/CD              | `wct-id-8`    |
| Insecure Kubernetes Cluster | `wct-id-423`  |
| Insecure Use of Secrets     | `wct-id-7`    |
| Initial Access              | `wct-id-1854` |
| Persistence                 | `wct-id-1857` |
| Privilege Escalation        | `wct-id-1858` |
| Reliability Impact          | `wct-id-940`  |
| Unprotected AI Model        | `wct-id-1998` |
| Unprotected Data            | `wct-id-422`  |
| Unprotected Principal       | `wct-id-6`    |
| Vulnerability               | `wct-id-3`    |
